html:
Exclusive to:  

A Horn is an Item introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It has a 33% chance to be dropped when a Water Beefalo is killed. It can be used to craft Horned Helmet and Dripple Pipes.

Usage

×4

×2

Trivia

  • Horns are very similar in usage to Beefalo Horns which are obtained by killing Beefalo. Both items are used to craft head slot items and are used as parts of playable musical instruments.
  • It is the first stackable item to not stack to 10, 20 or 40.
Tools and WeaponsResources

“I grabbed the ox by the horn.”
–Wilson
“I could use an ox-tra one of these.”
–Willow
“Horn of strong ox!”
–Wolfgang
“It's been severed from its owner.”
–Wendy
“NEEDS A REED TO ACCESS ACOUSTIC POTENTIAL”
–WX-78
“The lumbering mammal dropped this horn.”
–Wickerbottom
“It used to be attached to an ox.”
–Woodie
“The beast stood no chance.”
–Maxwell
“Ah! An ivory incisor. Theoretically, I can find a use for it.”
–Wagstaff
“Ah, a fine mug it wöuld make!”
–Wigfrid
“We could put these on something to make it sharp.”
–Webber
“I'm glad it's not attached to anything.”
–Walani
“A lovely souvenir from a once powerful beast.”
–Warly
“A terrible beastly horn.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS A BIG, BIG HORN”
–Wilba
“Branches?”
–Wormwood
“Someone else's teeth.”
–Wheeler
A Horn is an Item introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It has a 33% chance to be dropped when a Water Beefalo is killed. It can be used to craft Horned Helmet and Dripple Pipes.
Usage[edit | edit source]
×4
×2
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Horns are very similar in usage to Beefalo Horns which are obtained by killing Beefalo. Both items are used to craft head slot items and are used as parts of playable musical instruments.
It is the first stackable item to not stack to 10, 20 or 40.

A '''Horn''' is an [[Item]] introduced in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It has a 33% chance to be dropped when a [[Water Beefalo]] is killed. It can be used to craft [[Horned Helmet]] and [[Dripple Pipes]].

=={{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage==
{{Recipe 
|item1 = Horn
|item2 = Seashell
|count2 = 4
|item3 = Rope
|tool = Alchemy Engine
|result = Horned Helmet}}
{{Recipe 
|item1 = Horn
|item2 = Nightmare Fuel
|count2 = 2
|item3 = Rope
|tool = Prestihatitator
|result = Dripple Pipes}}

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Horns are very similar in usage to [[Beefalo Horn]]s which are obtained by killing [[Beefalo]]. Both items are used to craft head slot items and are used as parts of playable musical instruments.
* It is the first stackable item to not stack to 10, 20 or 40.
